hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
fp = data.get('tool_response', {}).get('filePath') or data.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path', '')
if not fp.endswith('.html'):
    sys.exit(0)
try:
    with open(fp, 'r') as f:
        content = f.read()
except Exception:
    sys.exit(0)
script = '<script data-goatcounter=\"https://fo-grdf.goatcounter.com/count\" async src=\"//gc.zgo.at/count.js\"></script>'
if script in content:
    sys.exit(0)
new_content = content.replace('</body>', script + '\n</body>')
with open(fp, 'w') as f:
    f.write(new_content)
" 2>/dev/null || true
